parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The Solace connection name to use.

parameter.name: destinationType
parameter.description: Destination type: TOPIC or QUEUE (default: TOPIC).

parameter.name: destinationName
parameter.description: Name of the topic or queue to send the request to.

parameter.name: deliveryMode
parameter.description: Delivery mode: DIRECT, PERSISTENT, or NON_PERSISTENT (default: DIRECT). PERSISTENT/NON_PERSISTENT use a temporary queue for guaranteed request-reply.

parameter.name: messageType
parameter.description: Message type: TEXT, BYTES, or XML (default: TEXT). JSON payloads are auto-detected and carried as TEXT.

parameter.name: requestTimeout
parameter.description: Maximum time to wait for response in milliseconds (default: 30000).

parameter.name: correlationId
parameter.description: Correlation ID for the request message.

parameter.name: senderId
parameter.description: Sender ID for the request message.

parameter.name: userProperties
parameter.description: Custom user properties as JSON object (e.g., {"region":"US"}).

parameter.name: dmqEligible
parameter.description: Whether the message is eligible for the Dead Message Queue (true/false).

parameter.name: elidingEligible
parameter.description: Whether the message is eligible for eliding (true/false).

parameter.name: expiration
parameter.description: Absolute message expiration time as a UTC epoch in milliseconds (0 means no expiration).

parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The name of the variable to which the output should be stored.

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: Replace the Message Body in Message Context with the response.
